listOfQuestions.question: Choose the best match for "Producer" in Ecology and Ecosystems.
listOfQuestions.correctAnswer: An organism that makes its own food from energy sources
wrongAnswers: A struggle for limited resources
The largest population an environment can support sustainably
A community of organisms interacting with their environment

listOfQuestions.question: Choose the best match for "Consumer" in Ecology and Ecosystems.
listOfQuestions.correctAnswer: An organism that gets energy by eating other organisms
wrongAnswers: A relationship where both species benefit
Gradual change in a biological community over time
The place where an organism normally lives

listOfQuestions.question: Choose the best match for "Decomposer" in Ecology and Ecosystems.
listOfQuestions.correctAnswer: An organism that breaks down dead material
wrongAnswers: A relationship where one organism benefits and the other is harmed
A species with a large effect on its ecosystem
Members of the same species living in an area

listOfQuestions.question: Choose the best match for "Food web" in Ecology and Ecosystems.
listOfQuestions.correctAnswer: A network of feeding relationships
wrongAnswers: A relationship where one species benefits and the other is unaffected
A non-native species that causes harm in a new area
Different populations living and interacting in an area
